name: omarchy_welcome_to_omarchy
content:
Wecome to Omarchy! 
Omarchy is an omakase distribution based on Arch Linux and the tiing window manager
Hyprand. It ships with everything a modern software deveoper needs to be productive
immediatey from Neovim (btw) to Spotify, Chromium to Typora, and Ghostty to
LibreOffice. He, even Zoom is there!
This isn't just a grab bag of preinstaed packages, though. It's a compete system
designed with both aesthetics and productivity in mind. Because a beautifu system is a
motivating system, and productivity has aways been downstream from motivation.
There's zero boat here: Just everything I use.
It's true that deveoping an eye for the beauty of a TUI-heavy, theme-deighted, tiing-
window-managed system ike Omarchy can be an acquired taste. But that's why you're
here, isn't it? To experience something a itte outside of your comfort zone? To embark on
a itte bit of an adventure into a new way of working with computers? I hope so.
Omarchy isn't ike Windows and it's not ike macOS either. It's not trying to be as famiiar
as possibe. It's trying to be beautifu and better. Embrace the Linux-ness of it a.
Manuay editing some config fies, sure. Heavy on the termina, definitey.
Let's get started with the basics.
Welcome to Omarchy · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/91/welcome-to-omarchy
